description: Final comprehensive 4-panel visualization: active site, nearest neighbors, GO hierarchy, and verdict
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig = plt.figure(figsize=(18, 12))

# Create a 2x2 grid
gs = fig.add_gridspec(2, 2, hspace=0.35, wspace=0.3)

# ========== Panel A: Active Site Conservation ==========
ax1 = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, 0])

residues = ['C47\n(CP)', 'C166\n(CR)', 'T44', 'E50', 'R120']
x = np.arange(len(residues))

# All conserved
bars = ax1.bar(x, [1]*5, color=['#e74c3c', '#e74c3c', '#3498db', '#3498db', '#3498db'], 
               alpha=0.85, width=0.6, edgecolor='white', linewidth=2)

# Labels on bars
res_labels = ['C', 'C', 'T', 'E', 'R']
for i, (bar, label) in enumerate(zip(bars, res_labels)):
    ax1.text(i, 0.5, label, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=18, fontweight='bold', color='white')

ax1.set_xticks(x)
ax1.set_xticklabels(residues, fontsize=10)
ax1.set_ylim(0, 1.4)
ax1.set_yticks([0, 1])
ax1.set_yticklabels(['Absent', 'Present'])
ax1.set_title('A. Catalytic Residue Conservation\n(Q88K52 vs S. typhimurium AhpC)', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

ax1.text(2, 1.2, '5/5 CONSERVED — Active peroxidase', ha='center', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='#27ae60',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='#d5f5e3', edgecolor='#27ae60', linewidth=1.5))

legend1 = [mpatches.Patch(color='#e74c3c', alpha=0.85, label='Essential Cys (CP/CR)'),
           mpatches.Patch(color='#3498db', alpha=0.85, label='Active-site proximal')]
ax1.legend(handles=legend1, fontsize=8, loc='upper left')

# ========== Panel B: Nearest Neighbor Ranking ==========
ax2 = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, 1])

proteins = [
    ('S. typhimurium AhpC', 69.0, '#e74c3c', 'AhpF-dep'),
    ('E. coli AhpC', 67.9, '#e74c3c', 'AhpF-dep'),
    ('Human PRDX2', 47.6, '#3498db', 'Trx-dep'),
    ('P. putida tsaA', 47.3, '#3498db', 'Trx-dep'),
    ('S. cerevisiae TSA1', 46.5, '#3498db', 'Trx-dep'),
    ('H. pylori AhpC', 42.9, '#3498db', 'Trx-dep'),
    ('M. tuberculosis AhpC', 38.3, '#f39c12', 'AhpD-dep'),
]

names = [p[0] for p in proteins]
identities = [p[1] for p in proteins]
colors = [p[2] for p in proteins]

y_pos = np.arange(len(proteins))
bars2 = ax2.barh(y_pos, identities, color=colors, alpha=0.85, height=0.65, edgecolor='white')

for i, (bar, val) in enumerate(zip(bars2, identities)):
    ax2.text(val + 0.8, i, f'{val:.1f}%', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')

ax2.set_yticks(y_pos)
ax2.set_yticklabels(names, fontsize=9)
ax2.set_xlabel('Sequence Identity (%)', fontsize=10)
ax2.set_title('B. Nearest Characterized Homologs', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax2.set_xlim(0, 82)
ax2.invert_yaxis()

# Gap annotation
ax2.axhline(y=1.5, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.6, linewidth=1.5)
ax2.annotate('~20 pp gap', xy=(57, 1.5), fontsize=9, color='gray', fontweight='bold',
             ha='center', va='center', bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='white', edgecolor='gray'))

legend2 = [mpatches.Patch(color='#e74c3c', alpha=0.85, label='AhpF-dependent'),
           mpatches.Patch(color='#3498db', alpha=0.85, label='Trx-dependent'),
           mpatches.Patch(color='#f39c12', alpha=0.85, label='AhpD-dependent')]
ax2.legend(handles=legend2, fontsize=8, loc='lower right')

# ========== Panel C: GO Term Hierarchy ==========
ax3 = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 0])
ax3.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax3.set_ylim(0, 10)
ax3.axis('off')
ax3.set_title('C. GO Term Hierarchy & Assessment', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

# Draw hierarchy
terms = [
    (0.3, 8.5, 'GO:0051920', 'peroxiredoxin activity', '#27ae60', '✓ RECOMMENDED'),
    (1.0, 7.2, 'GO:0140824', 'Trx-dependent Prx activity', '#e67e22', '△ Not demonstrated'),
    (1.7, 5.9, 'GO:0008379', 'thioredoxin peroxidase activity', '#e74c3c', '△ SEED (too specific)'),
    (0.3, 4.3, 'GO:0102039', 'NADH-dependent Prx activity', '#27ae60', '✓ ALSO APPROPRIATE'),
]

for x, y, go_id, name, color, verdict in terms:
    ax3.text(x, y, f'{go_id}', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='#2c3e50')
    ax3.text(x, y - 0.45, f'{name}', fontsize=8.5, color='#555')
    ax3.text(8.5, y - 0.2, verdict, fontsize=8, ha='center', fontweight='bold', color=color,
             bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.2', facecolor=color+'18', edgecolor=color, linewidth=1.5))

# Arrows for hierarchy
ax3.annotate('', xy=(0.9, 7.7), xytext=(0.5, 8.2), arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='gray', lw=1.5))
ax3.annotate('', xy=(1.6, 6.4), xytext=(1.2, 6.9), arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='gray', lw=1.5))
ax3.text(0.3, 4.9, '(sibling — separate branch)', fontsize=7.5, color='gray', style='italic')

# Key quote box
ax3.text(5, 2.5, '"Tp lacks AhpF, the typical reductant\nfor such enzymes"', 
         ha='center', fontsize=9, style='italic', color='#8e44ad',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.4', facecolor='#f4ecf7', edgecolor='#8e44ad', linewidth=1.5))
ax3.text(5, 1.6, '— Parsonage et al. 2010 (Poole lab), PMID:20304799', 
         ha='center', fontsize=7.5, color='#8e44ad')

# ========== Panel D: Verdict Summary ==========
ax4 = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 1])
ax4.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax4.set_ylim(0, 10)
ax4.axis('off')
ax4.set_title('D. Verdict & Failure Mode Analysis', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

# Verdict box
ax4.text(5, 9, 'PARTIALLY SUPPORTED / TOO GENERAL', ha='center', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', color='#e67e22',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.5', facecolor='#fdebd0', edgecolor='#e67e22', linewidth=2.5))

# Failure mode
ax4.text(5, 7.8, 'Failure mode #1: Granularity (family-vs-subfamily)', ha='center', fontsize=10, 
         fontweight='bold', color='#d35400')

# Checklist
checks = [
    ('✓', 'Peroxidase activity confirmed (5/5 catalytic residues)', '#27ae60'),
    ('✓', 'Correct fold & subfamily (AhpC/Prx1, cd03015)', '#27ae60'),
    ('✓', 'Not a pseudo-enzyme (failure mode #2 ruled out)', '#27ae60'),
    ('✓', 'Not mis-placed (failure mode #3 ruled out)', '#27ae60'),
    ('✗', 'Thioredoxin as reductant: NOT demonstrated', '#e74c3c'),
    ('✗', 'AhpF is "the typical reductant" (Poole lab)', '#e74c3c'),
    ('✗', 'Separate Trx-dep Prx (tsaA) in same organism', '#e74c3c'),
]

for i, (sym, text, color) in enumerate(checks):
    y = 6.8 - i * 0.65
    ax4.text(0.5, y, sym, fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', color=color)
    ax4.text(1.2, y, text, fontsize=8.5, color='#2c3e50')

# Recommendation
ax4.text(5, 2.2, 'Recommended: GENERALIZE to\nGO:0051920 (peroxiredoxin activity)', 
         ha='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color='#2980b9',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.4', facecolor='#d6eaf8', edgecolor='#2980b9', linewidth=2))

plt.savefig('final_verdict_summary.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Final summary figure saved.")
